CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM icebergS3(iceberg_conf, filename = 'test_table') WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'A%');
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id Int32, value Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

SELECT a.id, a.name, b.value FROM icebergS3(iceberg_conf, filename = 'test_table') AS a JOIN icebergS3(iceberg_conf, filename = 'test_table_2') AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE b.value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table_2);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM icebergS3(iceberg_conf, filename = 'test_table') WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
WITH temp AS (SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM icebergS3(iceberg_conf, filename = 'test_table') GROUP BY id) SELECT * FROM temp WHERE count > 1;
